    advanceTurn() - Method in class splendor.logic.GameState
    Ends the game after the last turn of the final round.
    AIAction - Record Class in splendor.logic.ai
    Represents a fully specified action selected by an AI strategy.
    AIAction(AIAction.ActionType, List, Tier, int, boolean, int) - Constructor for record class splendor.logic.ai.AIAction
    Creates an instance of a AIAction record class.
    AIAction.ActionType - Enum Class in splendor.logic.ai
    Enumerates AI action categories.
    AIDifficulty - Enum Class in splendor.logic.ai
    Enumerates the available AI difficulty presets for computer-controlled players.
    AIPlayer - Class in splendor.entities
    Represents a player controlled by an AIStrategy.
    AIPlayer(String, AIStrategy) - Constructor for class splendor.entities.AIPlayer
     
    AIStrategy - Interface in splendor.logic.ai
    Defines the contract for AI turn selection and discard decisions.
    Ansi - Class in splendor.ui
    Utility class for wrapping console text with ANSI escape codes when supported.

    GameEngine - Class in splendor.logic
    Applies Splendor rules to a GameState.

    Builds a new GameState from player and configuration data.

    Stores the mutable state of an in-progress Splendor game.

    GemBank - Class in splendor.entities
    Tracks the shared supply of gem tokens.
    GemBank(int) - Constructor for class splendor.entities.GemBank
    Creates a bank with Splendor's token counts for 2 to 4 players.

    Enumerates the gem token colors used in the Splendor game.

    Selects an action for the current turn.

    slotIndex() - Method in record class splendor.logic.ai.AIAction
    Returns the value of the slotIndex record component.
    splendor.app - package splendor.app
    Application entry points for launching the console-based Splendor game.
    splendor.data - package splendor.data
    Data-loading utilities for reading card and noble definitions from CSV resources.
    splendor.entities - package splendor.entities
    Core game entities used to model Splendor cards, nobles, players, gems, and decks.
    splendor.logic - package splendor.logic
    Game orchestration classes responsible for setup, turn resolution, and overall state.
    splendor.logic.ai - package splendor.logic.ai
    AI strategy types and action models used by computer-controlled Splendor players.
    splendor.ui - package splendor.ui
    Console rendering and interaction classes for running Splendor in a terminal.
    startFinalRound() - Method in class splendor.logic.GameState
     
    style(String, String...) - Static method in class splendor.ui.Ansi
     
    success(String) - Static method in class splendor.ui.Ansi
